_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Implement data mining and data warehousing applications.
reference_document_element_description: Monitor and optimize data application performance, including resource utilization analysis, query performance profiling, bottleneck identification, and capacity planning for growth.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-006 (DG, cosine: 0.483), DA-K-003 (DA, cosine: 0.479).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.493). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [applications, implement, mining, warehousing] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, application, bottleneck, capacity, growth, identification] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.887 (P=0.897, R=0.876). P exceeds R by 0.021 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Implement data mining and data warehousing applications." and "Monitor and optimize data application performance, including resource utilizatio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.525 ≈ STS 0.493 (gap 0.031). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [applications, implement, mining, warehousing]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, application, bottleneck, capacity, growth, identification].
